positive: A stylized, minimalist line art illustration of a celestial constellation forming a whimsical animal silhouette, such as a fox or bear. The stars are represented by varying sizes of clean, glowing orbs of gold and deep sapphire blue. The background should be a deep, midnight indigo gradient, suggesting the void of space, but with enough negative space for apparel printing. The composition should be perfectly centered and circular, designed to look excellent on a hoodie or t-shirt. Style: Modern geometric line art mixed with celestial watercolor wash. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal glow emanating only from the 'stars'. Color Palette: Indigo, Midnight Blue, Gold, Teal. Composition: Symmetrical and clean, suitable for direct screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, noise, blurry, messy lines, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, grayscale, low detail, artifacts, smudge, busy background
